testcase.name: create seller profile and explore what unlocks
testcase.system-out:
Profile already exists — skipping creation
After submit — URL: https://omre.ai/biz/business/dashboard Heading: Automated QA Test Store
=== Digital Products page === Heading: Digital Products btn: SOCIAL btn: NEWS btn: VIDEO btn: CHAT btn: BIZ btn: LINK btn: LEARN btn: STUDIO btn: ORBIT btn: GAMES btn: MART btn: MEETINGS btn: WALLET btn: Toggle theme btn: Add Product
=== Add Product form === URL: https://omre.ai/biz/business/dashboard/digital-products Heading: Digital Products input: type=INPUT name=null placeholder=Search products... input: type=INPUT name=null placeholder=e.g. Premium eBook - Complete Guide input: type=INPUT name=null placeholder=Brief summary shown in search results input: type=TEXTAREA name=null placeholder=Detailed product description, features, what's included input: type=SELECT name=null placeholder=null input: type=number name=null placeholder=0.00 input: type=number name=null placeholder=Original price (for discount display) input: type=number name=null placeholder=Your cost input: type=INPUT name=null placeholder=e.g. EBOOK-001 input: type=number name=null placeholder=Unlimited (0 or empty) input: type=SELECT name=null placeholder=null input: type=SELECT name=null placeholder=null input: type=INPUT name=null placeholder=e.g. ebook, guide, tutorial, premium input: type=SELECT name=null placeholder=null input: type=INPUT name=null placeholder=Your brand name btn: Cancel btn: Add Product btn: Close
